properties.Deficiency_Description:
Vegetation on Dam face
Spillway and log boom needs cleaned out
log cribbing above LLO is rotten 
dam faces too steep

Pu - The stability of the upstream slope of the main dam under rapid drawdown conditions has
not been examined and should be carried out as part of a future deficiency investigation, Pu - assess the seismic performance of the
dam including embankment liquefaction, slope instability, deformation and settlement,
post-earthquake seepage and piping (Section 3.1.7.3).
